assertions.text: Uses the user's uploaded/selected real photos and does NOT generate new images.
Follows the photo intake (upload/select) then layout then caption order.
Produces a print-ready HTML album with grid/collage/page layouts and captions.

cases.prompt: Make a photo album from these family pictures, my grandparents will use it

assertions.text: Defaults to large-font / simple mode with guardian assist for elderly users.
Hands off print/PDF binding to office-docs(Core).
